description: Ground truth for dirsql-isolated fixture. Derived from code audit of src/ on main after #159 + #162 + #189 shipped (2026-04-23).

npm_platform_family.evidence: src/handlers/npm-platform.ts synthesizes @org/pkg-<target> packages and rewrites top-level's optionalDependencies; config: build = 'napi' | 'bundled-cli' + targets = [...]
npm_platform_family.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent proposes adding a primitive that exists

depends_on_serialization.evidence: src/publish.ts — toposort by depends_on before publishing
depends_on_serialization.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent asks to 'verify' ordering that is already guaranteed

idempotent_precheck.evidence: All three handlers (src/handlers/{npm,crates,pypi}.ts) GET the registry before publishing; publish.ts skips already-published
idempotent_precheck.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent proposes adding check_published logic that exists

bundled_cli_understood.evidence: bundled-cli is a builder for npm handler that packages a CLI binary across a target matrix; see src/config.ts and src/handlers/npm-platform.ts
bundled_cli_understood.failure_mode_if_not_understood: false-negative — agent infers meaning from name only

per_target_runner_override.evidence: Since #159 / PR #191 — src/config.ts:69-79 accepts TARGET_ENTRY union of bare triple or {triple, runner}; src/plan.ts emits selected runner into the build-matrix rows. Docs: /guide/configuration#target-entries.
per_target_runner_override.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent claims a gap that was closed

doctor_oidc_trust_policy_check.evidence: Since #162 + #189 / PRs #190 + #192 — src/doctor.ts runs three trust-policy phases: (1) local workflow-structure check always, (2) declared diff vs workflow file + GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF when [package.trust_policy] is set, (3) crates.io registry cross-check when CRATES_IO_DOCTOR_TOKEN is set. Docs: /guide/auth#declaring-trust-policy-expectations.
doctor_oidc_trust_policy_check.failure_mode_if_claimed_missing: false-negative — agent claims a gap that was closed
